details: Snapshot committed. Investigating BLOCK_SHARDED bf16 acc=False gamma=randn (1,1,32,8192) relRMS~0.9997 scale error in PASS2 gamma multiply

Read compute kernel (IS_CROSS_CORE pass2), sharded reader (per-block gamma read g_base_tile=w_tile_start+b*W_BLOCK_TILES), descriptor _build_cross_core_descriptor. cb_gamma_tiles depth=2*W_BLOCK_TILES=16, cb_norm depth=8, cb_sumsq depth=1 fp32. Pass2: mul<Col> x*(1/rms)->cb_norm, mul<Row> *gamma->cb_output

Error is uniform 2.0x across ALL cores/W-tiles (mean ratio 1.9993). CONTRADICTS briefing: gamma=ones ALSO gives 2x (relRMS 0.9979) in my run, and const gammas too. So bug is gamma-value-INDEPENDENT = the gamma multiply PATH, not gamma slicing. Implementer blind spot: gamma=ones does NOT pass currently.

compute_ct_args FAIL vs PASS differ ONLY in origin_H(32/128) and tiles_per_image(1/4) which are DECLARED BUT UNUSED in compute kernel. compute_rt identical. So compute program byte-identical per-core. Only runtime diff: input TensorAccessor (shard 8x1 vs 8x4) and core/group count (8/1grp vs 32/4grp). gamma TA identical (2,2048). Uniform 2.0x is arithmetic not race.

DEVICE_PRINT peeks (cb_wait_front on cb_norm/cb_gamma/cb_output at pass2 t=0,b=0) MASK the 2x -> instrumented build PASSES relRMS 0.0060. Also all-ones x is correct, randn x fails. So bug is compute-side pipeline/reconfig/DST-state race at pass1->pass2 boundary, exposed by timing (num_w_blocks=4+ny=1+acc=False). Not gamma slicing.

Bug = cross-thread pipeline hazard in pass2 gamma chain. cb_norm (idx26) is the only CB unique to gamma path: single-buffered depth=W_BLOCK_TILES=8, PACK writes (mul<Col>) UNPACK reads (mul<Row>). nwb dependence (4 fail, 2 pass) fits reuse-cycle count. Testing H2: double-buffer cb_norm.

Kernel byte-identical to snapshot, helper lib byte-identical to TT_METAL_HOME. Same source recompiled -> PASS reproducibly (5x + fresh nwb=8/12288/WIDTH/3D). 2x tied to compiled artifact not source. Likely STALE JIT-cached binary predating 2c1a6caccd clean-cb_partial fix. Wrote debug test; hammering with seeds in production mode.

DIAGNOSIS: 2x was a STALE JIT-cached compute-kernel binary not reflecting the 2c1a6caccd clean-cb_partial fix. Guaranteed-fresh compile of byte-identical source PASSES both failing configs (relRMS 0.0060). 21 debug cases (3 seeds, production mode) + 70 acceptance tests + fresh nwb=8/12288/WIDTH/3D all PASS. No source fix needed. Confidence HIGH current source correct.
